headline: Everest Group (NYSE:EG) Beats Q1 Estimates as Strategic Shift Gains Traction
summary: Everest Group beats Q1 estimates with $16.08 EPS, driven by improved underwriting and lower catastrophe losses, as its strategic shift gains traction.

headline: Everest Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: Annualized 16.8% Net Income ROE and 16.7% Net Operating Income ROE$316 million of Underwriting Income and Combined Ratio of 91.2%Repurchased $331 million of Common Shares During the Quarter...

headline: Neutrinos Named a Leader in Everest Group's 2026 Insurance-specific IDP PEAK Matrix® Assessment
summary: Neutrinos, a leader in AI-powered intelligent automation for insurers, has been named a Leader in Everest Group's 2026 Insurance-specific Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) Products PEAK Matrix® Assessment.
